## What this PR does

<!-- One or two sentences. Link the related issue if there is one. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New sector module
- [ ] Changes to an existing module or the core protocol
- [ ] New example
- [ ] Docs / tooling

## Checklist (for sector modules — see CONTRIBUTING.md)

- [ ] Module is `skills/cv-screener/references/<sector-name>.md` (lowercase, hyphenated)
- [ ] Contains all required sections (persona, core protocol reference, keywords, pass/fail criteria, calibration, output additions)
- [ ] Tone follows the standard (objective, direct, no coaching)
- [ ] Hard disqualifiers are defensible and sector-specific
- [ ] Score calibration weights sum to 100%
- [ ] Router sector map in `skills/cv-screener/SKILL.md` is updated
- [ ] `README.md` Covered Sectors table is updated
- [ ] `./scripts/validate.sh` passes locally
- [ ] No personal data anywhere in the diff
